# Sahaya Savari F

> AI Developer & M.Sc Artificial Intelligence Student

## About

Sahaya Savari F is an AI Developer pursuing M.Sc in Artificial Intelligence at St. Joseph's College (Autonomous), Trichy, India. Focused on building intelligent systems, machine learning solutions, and modern full-stack applications.

## Skills

- Artificial Intelligence: Machine Learning, Deep Learning (TensorFlow, PyTorch), Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, LLM Integration, Prompt Engineering
- Python Development: Flask, FastAPI, Pandas, NumPy, API Development, Automation
- Web Development: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Vite, Full-stack Architecture
- Data & Databases: SQL, Data Visualization (Matplotlib, Seaborn), Database Design

## Projects

### Daily Spark
- Type: Productivity App
- Stack: Python, Firebase, React, AI/ML, TypeScript
- Description: A daily motivation and habit-tracking application that helps users build positive routines with AI-powered personalized suggestions. Tracks daily habits and analyzes user behavior patterns to generate personalized daily routines and motivational nudges.
- Link: https://daily-spark-app-da74b.web.app

### PrepMind AI
- Type: AI Education Platform
- Stack: Python, OpenAI API, React, Tailwind CSS
- Description: An intelligent study companion that generates practice questions, summaries, and personalized learning paths using AI. Transforms static study materials into interactive, adaptive learning experiences.
- Status: In Development

### Portfolio Website
- Type: Web Development
- Stack: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Vite
- Description: A modern, animated portfolio website featuring liquid glass design, hardware-accelerated animations, and responsive layout architecture.
- Link: https://sahayasavari.web.app
- Source: https://github.com/sahaya-savari/portfolio

## Certifications

- IBM Data Analyst Course (Data Analytics)
- Honor's Diploma in Information Technology
- Mastering Excel Data Analysis & Dashboard Reporting (Business Intelligence)

## Education

- M.Sc. Artificial Intelligence — St. Joseph's College (Autonomous), Trichy (Current)
